Hero.tagline: Building elegant solutions to complex problems
Hero.specializing: Specializing in React, Node.js, and cloud architecture.

About.title: I build software that solves real problems and delights users.
About.bio: Passionate full-stack engineer with over 2 years of experience crafting high-performance applications. I specialize in React, Node.js, and cloud architecture. I love turning ideas into reality and am always eager to master new technologies.

items.title: Front-End Developer
description: Developed and maintained administrative dashboards and internal portals for managing health insurance proposals, contracts, and documentation.
Implemented responsive and scalable interfaces using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, significantly improving performance and UX.
Collaborated in agile squads alongside product, design, and back-end teams to deliver new features and ensure seamless API integration.
Actively contributed to code quality through best practices, refactoring, and architectural consistency.

items.title: External Relations Director & Front-End Manager
items.company: TITAN - UFBA Computer Engineering Junior Enterprise
description: Led front-end development for web projects, including institutional websites and event landing pages.
Managed teams and coordinated projects while serving as President and External Relations Director.
Represented the institution before partners, university departments, and the Junior Enterprise Movement.
